content: Introduces `Class.AnimationClip.Length|Length` to allow easy access to the duration of an `AnimationClip` instance.
Fixes a crash with `SetResolutionAsync`.
Input Action System: `TouchPosition` keycode can now be used in `Class.InputBinding` to trigger `Class.InputAction` of type `bool`.
Scaling an avatar with layered clothing no longer retriggers layered clothing fitting, resulting in significantly improved performance.
Adds a new `Class.SurfaceAppearance.ResampleMode|ResampleMode` for `Class.SurfaceAppearance`.
In the New Luau Type Solver, non-strict mode no longer reports type checking errors for `**error-type**`.
Adds support for negative speed in `Enum.AnimationNodeType.ClipNode` and `Enum.AnimationNodeType.SpeedNode` animation graph nodes. Animation Graph is currently a beta feature.

With New Camera Controls beta enabled, the studio camera can now be rotated and zoomed using the keypad.

  • 1: View Front
  • Ctrl/Cmd + 1: View Back
  • 2: Tilt/Orbit down
  • 3: View Right
  • Ctrl/Cmd + 3: View Left
  • 4: Pan/Orbit left
  • 6: Pan/Orbit Right
  • 7: View Top
  • Ctrl/Cmd + 7: View Bottom
  • 8: Tilt/Orbit up
  • +: Zoom in
  • -: Zoom out

Removes log spam of "Failed to play animation: [http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=<assetid](http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=%3Cassetid)>. AnimationTrack limit of 64 tracks exceeded for 'SelfAvatar', new animations will not be played."
Fixes a small volume boost in the pitch shifter effects.
Fixes night sky star twinkle rate at high FPS.
Adds extra validation to `Terrain:CopyRegion`. An error will be output rather than a script time out when the region extents are empty or inverted.
Fixes `UIScale` causing `ScrollingFrame` scroll bar to not clip its children.
Fixes dark lighting that can occur when the sun is precisely in the center of the sky.
Fixes SLIM handling of legacy surface types on `Class.SpecialMesh` objects.
Fixes a case where script analysis would not warn on invalid assignments.
Fixes search functionality in the Style Editor plugin in Roblox Studio.
Fixes issue where with certain configurations `Class.IKControl|IKControls` would not work.
Fixes an issue where `Class.AudioPitchShifter` would briefly play a portion of the previous audio stream when a new stream was played.
Fixes a bug where opening/closing the Animation Editor would remove the `Class.Animator` on the rig and create a new one, thereby deleting all of its previous state.
Fixes an issue where the root bone would not animate on certain imported character configurations.
Fixes a precision issue in `Library.math.noise()` for very large input values.
Adds syntax highlighting for `const` keyword.
Fixes occasional frame spike when a USB device disconnects.
Fixes a bug in the animation graph Sequence node (`AnimationNodeType.SequenceNode`) where the Trigger field does not advance the sequence.
Fixes an issue in AdaptiveAnimations where translation weight wasn't properly respected by Animator when combined track weights were less than 1.0.
Optimizes Studio Output window performance when output is received only in hidden contexts.
Fixes rare timing issue with Studio Output window that would result in bad ordering for print statements when using `task.defer`.
Fixes issue where printing complex tables with `__tostring` metamethods crashed Studio.
Fixes issue with using script breakpoints on local plugins while in Play mode.
